purpose: Final demo cases for the Cursor support X triage prototype.

cases.text: @cursorsupport wtf you charged me for april even though i canceled my subscription

cases.scenario: Refund request for a prior billing period
cases.text: @cursorsupport i want a refund for last month can someone fix this

cases.scenario: Made an account but cannot connect in the IDE
cases.text: @cursorsupport i made an account but i can't connect in the IDE. it keeps failing when i try to sign in

cases.scenario: Support email feels unresponsive and user wants to switch to annual billing
cases.text: @cursorsupport paying customer here. i emailed support 2 days ago and got no confirmation. also how do i switch to annual without canceling my next monthly renewal?

cases.scenario: Charged after trial and user cannot use the sales contact path
cases.text: @cursorsupport i got charged even though i did the 2 week pro trial. contact sales won't take my gmail. is there any support i can contact?

cases.scenario: Billing thread stalled and paid prompts are unusable
cases.text: @cursorsupport billing issue here. support stopped replying and i got charged extra for premium prompts but still can't use them. what do i do?
